text.content: 🌿 GREENS (Always Available to Accompany Any Meal)

text.content: All the above meals can be served with one or more of these common Kenyan greens:

text.content: Sauté with onions, tomatoes, and a little oil. Use a fist‑sized portion per meal for satiety and micronutrients.
